allow: PowerShell("ffmpeg: " + \(Get-Command ffmpeg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; "manim:  " + \(Get-Command manim  -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; "latex:  " + \(Get-Command latex  -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell("latex:    " + \(Get-Command latex    -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; "dvisvgm:  " + \(Get-Command dvisvgm  -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; "ffmpeg:   " + \(Get-Command ffmpeg   -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; "miktex:   " + \(Get-Command miktex   -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; "initexmf: " + \(Get-Command initexmf -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)
PowerShell(miktex packages install standalone preview amsmath amssymb amsfonts xcolor doublestroke setspace rsfs relsize ragged2e fundus-calligra microtype wasysym physics dvisvgm 2>&1)
